backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend data types (StressReading, MoodEntry, SleepEntry, etc.) and per-user state maps; includes mixins for blob storage and authorization, and exposes CRUD methods for user wellness data, consent records, and deletion scheduling.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs (Privacy & Data Control section, Full Account Deletion flow, Selective Data Deletion, etc.) to their implementing files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one- to two-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's pages, hooks, and components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the TRANQUIL PWA that links the manifest, sets iOS and theme-color meta tags, mounts the React root div, and registers the service worker on load.
frontend/public/manifest.json: Web App Manifest for TRANQUIL declaring app name, teal theme/dark background colors, standalone portrait display mode, and 192×192 / 512×512 maskable PNG icons.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker that pre-caches the TRANQUIL app shell on install, purges stale caches on activate, and uses a cache-first strategy for static GET requests while bypassing all ICP canister API calls.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider and AuthGuard, and conditionally renders LoginScreen, TermsAcceptanceModal, or ProfileSetupModal based on auth and profile state.
frontend/src/components/AvatarSelector.t: Renders a grid of 6 emoji avatar buttons with color highlights, allowing users to select an avatar by ID.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with icons and labels for Home, Breathe, Sounds, Journal, and Analytics routes, highlighting the active route.
Animated breathing circle that scales and changes color based on the current breath phase (inhale, hold, exhale, etc.) and phase progress.
frontend/src/components/ComplianceCard.t: Displays Privacy Policy and Terms of Service consent status, allowing users to view policies in a modal and record acceptance via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/DataExportCard.t: Provides buttons to export the user's data in JSON, CSV, or PDF (HTML) formats by fetching user data and triggering browser downloads.
frontend/src/components/DeleteAccountMod: Multi-step modal for account deletion that requires password or biometric authentication, then confirms deletion with an optional 7-day recovery period.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCalmBut: A styled full-width button that triggers Emergency Calm Mode when clicked.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCalmOve: Full-screen overlay that guides users through a 60-second calm routine (breathing, body scan, affirmation phases) with a progress bar and animated visuals.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header displaying the TRANQUIL logo, a tips button, a profile avatar button, and a settings button with active-state highlighting based on current route.
A 1–5 range slider component for selecting exercise intensity, with color-coded labels and dot indicators reflecting the current value.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that renders the Header, a scrollable main content area via Outlet, and the BottomNav within a max-width container.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Full-screen login page that displays app branding, feature highlights, and a 'Get Started' button that triggers Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/MoodSelector.tsx: Horizontal mood picker with five emoji options (Great to Stressed), highlighting the selected mood with a matching border and background color.
frontend/src/components/PolicyModal.tsx: Dialog modal that renders either the Privacy Policy or Terms of Service content in a scrollable area, toggled by the `type` prop.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Onboarding modal for new users to choose an avatar and enter their name, then save the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProfileStats.tsx: Displays a three-column grid of user stats (breathing sessions, average stress score, mood entries) sourced from the UserProfile type.
frontend/src/components/ReminderToggle.t: A labeled toggle row with an emoji icon and a Switch component for enabling or disabling a specific reminder setting.
frontend/src/components/SecurityInfoCard: Renders a grid of security feature cards (AES-256, BLE encryption, MFA, etc.) each with an icon, title, and short description.
frontend/src/components/SelectiveDataDel: Renders a card UI with four data deletion actions (latest stress reading, latest mood entry, all analytics history, device pairing data), each with a confirmation dialog before executing the corresponding mutation.
frontend/src/components/SoundTile.tsx: A button tile component for a sound selector that displays an emoji, title, and an animated sound-wave indicator when the sound is playing.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: An interactive 1–5 star rating component that highlights stars on hover and updates the selected value via an onChange callback.
frontend/src/components/StressChart.tsx: Renders a color-coded bar chart of daily stress scores using Recharts, with bars colored by stress level (low/medium/high) and a legend.
frontend/src/components/StressGauge.tsx: Displays a circular SVG gauge showing a numeric stress score and level badge, with color and glow effects that vary by stress level (low/medium/high).
frontend/src/components/TermsAcceptanceM: A modal dialog that presents privacy and terms content in a scrollable area, requiring the user to check an acceptance checkbox before proceeding, then records acceptance via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/TipCard.tsx: Displays a wellness tip card with a category-specific emoji, color-coded border, title, description, and category badge.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for toggling dark/light theme, persisting the preference to localStorage and applying a 'dark' class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous Internet Computer actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts: A custom hook managing playback state for both preset sound tiles and a user-loaded local audio file, handling play/pause via HTMLAudioElement refs and cleaning up object URLs on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: React hook and utilities for Web Authentication API biometric re-authentication, exposing availability checking and a challenge-based verification flow.
frontend/src/hooks/useBreathingTimer.ts: React hook managing a multi-phase breathing exercise timer with configurable techniques (4-7-8, Box, Deep Calm), tracking phase progress, cycles, and elapsed time.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalmRoutine.ts: React hook that runs a 60-second guided calm routine cycling through breathing, body scan, and affirmation phases, tracking progress and phase transitions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profiles, stress readings, breathing sessions, mood/sleep entries, and other data operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useStressSimulation.t: React hook that simulates fluctuating biometric sensor data (heart rate, skin temp, motion) and periodically persists computed stress readings to the backend.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/utilities, CSS custom properties for a calming light/dark color palette (lavender, mint, teal), typography, and stress-level color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Displays a weekly stress analytics page with a chart, daily averages, improvement message, and a list of recent individual stress readings that can be deleted with an inline confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/Breathe.tsx: Provides a guided breathing exercise page where users select a breathing technique, follow an animated timer, and save completed sessions to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Renders the main dashboard with a personalized greeting, a live stress gauge fed by simulated sensor data, sensor metric cards (heart rate, skin temp, motion), and quick-action shortcuts including an emergency calm overlay.
frontend/src/pages/Journal.tsx: Implements a mood journal page where users select a mood, optionally add a note, submit the entry, and view a reverse-chronological list of this week's past mood entries.
frontend/src/pages/Privacy.tsx: Presents a privacy and data management page allowing users to toggle analytics and AI prediction preferences, view data counts, clear analytics or device pairings, and delete their account.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Displays and allows editing of the user's profile (name and avatar), shows a shortened principal ID, and provides a logout button that clears the query cache.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page with sections for theme selection, notification/reminder toggles, and expandable data management cards (export, selective deletion, account deletion, security info, compliance).
frontend/src/pages/SleepTracking.tsx: Allows users to log sleep entries by entering bedtime, wake time, and quality rating, then displays the computed duration and a list of recent sleep entries.
frontend/src/pages/Sounds.tsx: Provides a grid of ambient/nature sound tiles and a local audio file uploader, with play/pause controls managed via the useAudioPlayer hook.
frontend/src/pages/TipsAndReminders.tsx: Shows AI-generated wellness tips and toggle controls for hydration, break, and stretch reminders, persisting reminder preferences via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/VibrationControl.tsx: React page for controlling wristband vibration therapy, allowing users to select from three patterns (Gentle Pulse, Rhythmic Tap, Deep Wave), adjust intensity via a slider, and send commands to the simulated BLE band using a mutation hook.
frontend/src/utils/dataExport.ts: Provides three export functions for user data: JSON download, CSV export of stress readings, and an HTML/PDF-style report with stats tables and mood summaries, all triggered as browser file downloads.
frontend/src/utils/errorHandling.ts: Single utility function that maps backend errors to user-facing toast notifications, handling Unauthorized, not-found, and generic error cases via the Sonner toast library.
frontend/src/utils/sleepCalculations.ts: Provides helpers to compute sleep duration in minutes from bedtime/wake-time strings (handling overnight wrap), format a minute count as a human-readable string, and convert a time string to a nanosecond BigInt timestamp.
frontend/src/utils/stressAnalytics.ts: Computes daily average stress scores for the past 7 days from raw StressReading data and generates a human-readable improvement message by comparing recent vs. older averages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for sensitive values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH color tokens, border radii, box shadows (glow/glass variants), typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and Nunito/Quicksand font families.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 5) describing TRANQUIL's implemented features, architectural decisions (Firebase, AES-256, BLE, GDPR/IT Act compliance), and known issues for build planning and feature tracking.
